violations.text: Bowls are being used as scoops in containers. Utensils used to dispense non-time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as sugar and flour must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food within the container. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2026
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the steak sandwich prep unit. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/28/2026
The handles on the two-door reach in located in the prep area was not in good repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/28/2026

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Per interview of PIC, chicken was placed hot in the refrigerator in containers greater than four inches deep. Chicken was moved to sheet pans in the walk-in cooler at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2024

Working containers of dry ingredients are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. Labels were added at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2024

Knives were observed being stored in between the 3-bay sink and wall. Knives were moved to the 3-bay sink to be washed, rinsed, and sanitized at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2024

The handle for the 2 door reach in refrigerator and the wall behind the prep table was observed in poor repair. Handle must be replaced and wall should be constructed of a material that is smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 11/01/2024
